calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Witness, Abdollah Dos, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Curtis Kulp.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial
Court returned Exhibit to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 220 Golden Gate Avenue #705, San Francisco, California 94102.

Damages $1370.85
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $400.00
Costs $0
for a Total Judgment of $1770.85

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Dulce Docken.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Curtis Kulp is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of October 3, 2016 remains on calendar. (501)
